---
title: "Manual Flowchart"
format: html
---

{{< badge resource >}}

# Which Manual Do I Need?
The FluvialGeomorph 
## Quick Decision Flowchart

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    Start([I need to work with<br/>fluvial geomorphology]) --> Question1{What do I<br/>need to do?}
    
    Question1 -->|Learn the science| Tech[Technical Manual]
    Question1 -->|Do the work| User[User Manual]
    Question1 -->|Both| Both[Use Both Manuals]
    
    Tech --> TechQ{What specifically?}
    TechQ -->|Understand methods| TechMethods[Technical Manual:<br/>Methods & Theory]
    TechQ -->|Learn equations| TechEq[Technical Manual:<br/>Calculations]
    TechQ -->|Validate approach| TechVal[Technical Manual:<br/>Quality Control]
    TechQ -->|Write report| TechReport[Technical Manual:<br/>References & Citations]
    
    User --> UserQ{What specifically?}
    UserQ -->|Install software| UserSetup[User Manual:<br/>Setup & Installation]
    UserQ -->|Process data| UserData[User Manual:<br/>Data Processing]
    UserQ -->|Run analysis| UserAnalysis[User Manual:<br/>Workflows]
    UserQ -->|Fix errors| UserTrouble[User Manual:<br/>Troubleshooting]
    
    Both --> BothQ{Starting point?}
    BothQ -->|New project| BothNew[Start: User Manual Setup<br/>Reference: Technical Manual Methods]
    BothQ -->|Learning| BothLearn[Start: Technical Manual Concepts<br/>Practice: User Manual Tutorials]
    BothQ -->|Quality check| BothQC[Execute: User Manual<br/>Validate: Technical Manual]

    style Tech fill:#e8f4f8
    style User fill:#fff4e6
    style Both fill:#f0e6ff
```

---

## Interactive Crosswalk Table

### 👤 I am a...

| User Type | Primary Manual | Secondary Manual | Start Here |
|-----------|---------------|------------------|------------|
| **Student/Beginner** | 🔧 User Manual | 📐 Technical Manual | User Manual: Getting Started |
| **Field Technician** | 🔧 User Manual | 📐 Technical Manual | User Manual: Field Data Collection |
| **GIS Analyst** | 🔧 User Manual | 📐 Technical Manual | User Manual: ArcGIS Workflows |
| **Hydrologist/Scientist** | 📐 Technical Manual | 🔧 User Manual | Technical Manual: Methods |
| **Project Manager** | 📐 Technical Manual | 🔧 User Manual | Technical Manual: Overview |
| **Reviewer/Regulator** | 📐 Technical Manual | 🔧 User Manual | Technical Manual: Validation |

---

## 🎯 I Need To...

### Planning & Understanding

| Task | Manual | Chapter/Section |
|------|--------|----------------|
| Understand stream classification systems | 📐 Technical | Stream Classification |
| Learn about hydraulic geometry | 📐 Technical | Hydraulic Geometry |
| Understand sediment transport | 📐 Technical | Sediment Transport Theory |
| Determine appropriate methods | 📐 Technical | Method Selection |
| Review scientific basis | 📐 Technical | Theoretical Foundations |
| Plan data collection | 🔧 User | Data Requirements |
| Estimate project timeline | 🔧 User | Workflow Overview |

### Setup & Installation

| Task | Manual | Chapter/Section |
|------|--------|----------------|
| Install ArcGIS Pro tools | 🔧 User | Application Setup |
| Install R and RStudio | 🔧 User | R Installation |
| Set up FluvialGeomorph package | 🔧 User | Package Installation |
| Configure LAStools | 🔧 User | LiDAR Tools Setup |
| Prepare workspace | 🔧 User | Project Setup |
| Download example data | 🔧 User | Getting Started |

### Field Work

| Task | Manual | Chapter/Section |
|------|--------|----------------|
| Understand what to measure | 📐 Technical | Field Methods Theory |
| Learn survey techniques | 📐 Technical | Survey Protocols |
| Follow field protocols | 🔧 User | Field Data Collection |
| Use survey equipment | 🔧 User | Equipment Guide |
| Record data properly | 🔧 User | Data Forms |
| Identify bankfull indicators | 📐 Technical + 🔧 User | Both: Bankfull Identification |

### Data Processing

| Task | Manual | Chapter/Section |
|------|--------|----------------|
| Import survey data | 🔧 User | Data Import |
| Process LiDAR | 🔧 User | LiDAR Processing |
| Create DEMs | 🔧 User | Terrain Development |
| Delineate reaches | 🔧 User | Reach Delineation |
| Generate cross-sections | 🔧 User | Cross-Section Tools |
| Clean/QC data | 🔧 User | Data Quality Control |

### Analysis

| Task | Manual | Chapter/Section |
|------|--------|----------------|
| Understand calculation methods | 📐 Technical | Calculation Methods |
| Calculate bankfull dimensions | 🔧 User | Bankfull Analysis Workflow |
| Perform hydraulic geometry analysis | 🔧 User | Hydraulic Geometry Tools |
| Classify stream type | 🔧 User | Classification Workflow |
| Assess channel stability | 🔧 User | Stability Analysis |
| Run sediment transport calculations | 🔧 User | Sediment Tools |

### Validation & QC

| Task | Manual | Chapter/Section |
|------|--------|----------------|
| Understand expected ranges | 📐 Technical | Validation Criteria |
| Check calculation accuracy | 📐 Technical | Quality Control |
| Verify results make sense | 📐 Technical | Result Interpretation |
| Run QC procedures | 🔧 User | QC Checklists |
| Compare with regional data | 📐 Technical | Regional Curves |
| Troubleshoot errors | 🔧 User | Troubleshooting |

### Reporting & Documentation

| Task | Manual | Chapter/Section |
|------|--------|----------------|
| Write methods section | 📐 Technical | Method Descriptions |
| Cite equations | 📐 Technical | References |
| Explain scientific basis | 📐 Technical | Theory Sections |
| Generate standard outputs | 🔧 User | Report Generation |
| Create visualizations | 🔧 User | Visualization Tools |
| Export results | 🔧 User | Data Export |

---

## 🔄 Common Workflows

### Workflow 1: Complete Stream Assessment

```
1. 📐 Technical Manual → Review appropriate methods for your stream type
2. 🔧 User Manual → Set up project and tools
3. 🔧 User Manual → Collect field data following protocols
4. 🔧 User Manual → Process data in ArcGIS Pro
5. 🔧 User Manual → Run analysis workflows
6. 📐 Technical Manual → Validate results against expected ranges
7. 🔧 User Manual → Generate reports
8. 📐 Technical Manual → Write methods section for deliverable
```

### Workflow 2: Learning a New Method

```
1. 📐 Technical Manual → Read theory and equations
2. 🔧 User Manual → Download example dataset
3. 🔧 User Manual → Follow tutorial step-by-step
4. 📐 Technical Manual → Understand why results look the way they do
5. 🔧 User Manual → Apply to your own data
6. 📐 Technical Manual → Validate your results
```

### Workflow 3: Troubleshooting an Issue

```
1. 🔧 User Manual → Check troubleshooting section
2. 🔧 User Manual → Verify workflow steps
3. 📐 Technical Manual → Confirm method is appropriate
4. 📐 Technical Manual → Check if results are within expected ranges
5. 🔧 User Manual → Review example to compare
```

---

## 📊 Quick Reference Matrix

|  | Learn Concepts | Execute Tasks | Validate Results | Write Reports |
|---|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| **Technical Manual** | ✅✅✅ | ⚠️ | ✅✅✅ | ✅✅✅ |
| **User Manual** | ⚠️ | ✅✅✅ | ⚠️ | ✅ |
| **Both Together** | ✅✅ | ✅✅ | ✅✅✅ | ✅✅ |

✅✅✅ = Primary resource  
✅✅ = Very helpful  
✅ = Helpful  
⚠️ = Limited coverage

---

## 🎓 Learning Paths by Experience Level

### 🟢 Beginner (New to Fluvial Geomorphology)

**Week 1-2: Foundations**
- 📐 Technical Manual: Introduction & Basic Concepts
- 🔧 User Manual: Getting Started & Setup

**Week 3-4: First Analysis**
- 🔧 User Manual: Tutorial with example data
- 📐 Technical Manual: Reference as needed

**Week 5+: Apply to Real Data**
- 🔧 User Manual: Your project workflow
- 📐 Technical Manual: Validation & QC

### 🟡 Intermediate (Some Experience)

**Quick Review**
- 📐 Technical Manual: Skim relevant methods
- 🔧 User Manual: Review workflow overview

**Execute**
- 🔧 User Manual: Follow specific workflows
- 📐 Technical Manual: Reference for validation

**Refine**
- 📐 Technical Manual: Advanced topics
- 🔧 User Manual: Advanced features

### 🔴 Advanced (Experienced Practitioner)

**Reference**
- 📐 Technical Manual: Deep dive into theory
- 🔧 User Manual: Quick workflow reminders

**Customize**
- 📐 Technical Manual: Adapt methods
- 🔧 User Manual: Advanced customization

**Innovate**
- 📐 Technical Manual: Understand limitations
- 🔧 User Manual: Extend capabilities

---

## 🔍 Search Guide

### If You're Looking For...

| Keyword | Check This Manual First |
|---------|------------------------|
| "How to..." | 🔧 User Manual |
| "Why..." | 📐 Technical Manual |
| "What is..." | 📐 Technical Manual |
| "Step-by-step..." | 🔧 User Manual |
| "Theory..." | 📐 Technical Manual |
| "Equation..." | 📐 Technical Manual |
| "Workflow..." | 🔧 User Manual |
| "Error..." | 🔧 User Manual |
| "Install..." | 🔧 User Manual |
| "Calculate..." | 🔧 User Manual (how) + 📐 Technical (why) |
| "Validate..." | 📐 Technical Manual |
| "Example..." | 🔧 User Manual |

---

## 📱 Quick Access Links

### Technical Manual - Most Used Sections
- [Stream Classification Methods](#)
- [Hydraulic Geometry Equations](#)
- [Bankfull Identification Criteria](#)
- [Validation & Expected Ranges](#)
- [References & Citations](#)

### User Manual - Most Used Sections
- [Getting Started & Setup](#)
- [Field Data Collection](#)
- [ArcGIS Pro Workflows](#)
- [R/FluvialGeomorph Tools](#)
- [Troubleshooting](#)

---

## 💡 Pro Tips

### For Best Results:

1. **Start with the right manual** for your immediate need
2. **Cross-reference** when you need deeper understanding
3. **Bookmark** frequently used sections in both
4. **Keep both open** when doing analysis
5. **Verify versions match** (e.g., both v1.2.0)

### Red Flags:

- ❌ Using only one manual for everything
- ❌ Skipping validation steps
- ❌ Not understanding the "why" behind methods
- ❌ Following workflows without checking appropriateness

### Green Flags:

- ✅ Consulting Technical Manual before starting
- ✅ Following User Manual workflows step-by-step
- ✅ Validating results with Technical Manual
- ✅ Understanding both theory and practice

---

## 📥 Download Both Manuals

| Manual | Best For | Download |
|--------|----------|----------|
| 📐 **Technical Manual** | Understanding methods & theory | [Download PDF](#) \| [View Online](#) |
| 🔧 **User Manual** | Step-by-step workflows | [Download PDF](#) \| [View Online](#) |
| 📦 **Example Data** | Practice and learning | [Download ZIP](#) |

---

## ❓ Still Not Sure?

**Contact us with your specific question, and we'll point you to the right manual and section!**

- 📧 Email: support@example.com
- 💬 Discussion Forum: [link]
- 📚 FAQ: [link]

---

**Remember: The manuals work best together!**  
📐 Technical Manual = The Science  
🔧 User Manual = The Practice  
🤝 Both Together = Success
